steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student is surprised by the differences in unit sales. The most remarkable case will show the biggest gap between two systems.

steps.title: Pick the data point
steps.content:
Choice A: Game & Watch (~18.6M) vs. ColecoVision (~2M) — a roughly 9× gap, dramatically larger than the gaps in B (4M vs. 3M) or C (4M vs. 3M). D mismatches the table values for MSX and Intellivision.

The biggest, most surprising disparity is in choice A.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
